name: Shupp Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Make noodles by cutting them much broader than for soup.
2. Cook in boiling salted water for about 10 minutes.
3. Drain the noodles.
4. Melt the butter and add the noodles, frying until light brown.
5. Beat the eggs and add seasoning to taste.
6. Stir the beaten eggs into the noodles.
7. Cook until the eggs are set.
8. Serve at once.
